All 4 trades lost on same entry (GLD/SLV buys) - signals proved wrong. Key findings: 1) Defensive commodity hedges failed despite geopolitical narrative - prices moved opposite to expected 2) News sentiment ('risk remains') was misleading - markets priced in risk-off already 3) Single-day volatility spiked after entry causing stop-loss hits before catalysts materialized 4) Entries clustered within 20 minutes created correlated risk - diversification needed 5) Stop-losses at 2% too tight for overnight geopolitical events - extend to 3-4% for defensive trades. Time-of-day: avoid entries within 30 min of major news releases (18:00-18:30). Avoid clustered orders on same day when market sentiment uncertain. News sentiment alone insufficient - validate with technical levels before entry.
